stemHtml: If screened passengers or their cabin baggage come into contact with unscreened persons, what must happen?

options.a: The affected passengers and their cabin baggage must be re-screened before boarding.
options.b: Only the passengers concerned must be re-screened.
options.c: The passengers, their cabin baggage, and their checked baggage must all be re-screened.
options.d: Only the cabin baggage must be re-screened.
